title: SpongeBot
shortDescription: Convert text to mocking SpongeBob case (aLtErNaTiNg CaSe) from Command Palette.
description:
Transform any text into the iconic mocking SpongeBob meme format with alternating case (lIkE tHiS). Just type or paste your text and get instant SpongeBob-style output, ready to copy and share.

A fun, lighthearted extension for when you need to add some humor to your messages.
